title: Healey announces tax credit awards to build almost 700 new homes in six Mass. cities
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Governor Maura Healey announced $18.6 million in tax credits for housing projects in six Massachusetts Gateway Cities.
The projects will create 662 new homes by converting historic buildings and mills into residential apartments.
The Housing Development Incentive Program aims to revitalize downtown neighborhoods and address the state's housing shortage.

title: FBI arrests Mass. man in armed bank robberies in NH, NJ
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Joseph Sawyer, 52, was arrested by an FBI SWAT team in Albany, NY, for armed bank robberies in NH and NJ.
Sawyer allegedly robbed banks in Nashua, NH, on June 12 and Boonton, NJ, on June 27, taking $18,000 total.
Operation Summer Heat 2.0, a multi-state FBI initiative, coordinated the arrest with numerous law enforcement agencies.

title: Motorcyclist missing since July 4 found dead in NH
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Wesley Grondin, missing since July 4, was found dead near his motorcycle in Shelburne, NH.
Grondin was last seen riding a Harley-Davidson westbound on Route 2 before a crash occurred.
Investigators found no evidence of another vehicle or person involved in the accident.

title: Gov. Maura Healey declares July 11 ‘Noah Kahan Day’
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Gov. Maura Healey declared July 11, 2026, as 'Noah Kahan Day' in Massachusetts.
Noah Kahan is recognized for his musical impact and mental health advocacy, with four sold-out Fenway Park concerts.
The Vermont-born artist lived in Watertown and has a deep connection with Massachusetts communities influencing his music.

title: ‘Let’s just call it a tour’: Judy Collins says her farewell tour isn’t a farewell
author: Lauren Daley
bullets: Judy Collins clarifies her 'farewell tour' is not a final tour but a continuation of her regular performances.
The 87-year-old singer will perform in New England, including Cape Cod and Tanglewood, as part of her 'Sweet Judy Blue Eyes' tour.
The tour will be filmed for a documentary on Collins's life and legacy, continuing until March 2027.

title: 3 new movies to watch on Netflix in July
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: 'A League of Their Own' (1992) features Geena Davis and Tom Hanks in a fictional tale about a 1940s women's baseball team.
'Moneyball' (2011) stars Brad Pitt as Oakland Athletics GM Billy Beane, emphasizing advanced baseball analytics.
'Gone Girl' (2014) showcases Ben Affleck as Nick Dunne, embroiled in a media frenzy after his wife goes missing.

title: Red Sox win 7th straight game just hours after landing in New York
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Boston Red Sox secured their seventh consecutive win, defeating the New York Mets 6-2 at Citi Field.
Sonny Gray pitched six innings of one-run ball, contributing to the win amid travel delays from Chicago.
Anthony Seigler hit a two-run homer extending the lead; Boston is now 1.5 games back of a wild-card spot.

title: Christian Gonzalez responds to report that he isn’t physical enough for Patriots
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Christian Gonzalez addresses a report by Greg Bedard claiming some in the Patriots doubt his physicality as a corner.
Gonzalez criticized Bedard's report on social media, while Bedard suggested ignoring media aggregators for message distortion.
In 2025, Gonzalez recorded 69 tackles, with his critics noting he's not as physical as other cornerbacks.

title: Here’s who experts have the Red Sox selecting with the No. 20 pick in the 2026 MLB Draft
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Experts predict varying first-round picks for Red Sox, including Chase Brunson, an outfielder from TCU.
Right-handed pitcher Taylor Rabe from Ole Miss is a top choice for the Red Sox's first-round pick, says Bleacher Report.
CBS Sports suggests Boston may select high school third baseman Bo Lowrance with their 20th overall draft pick.

title: 5 must-watch movies & TV shows streaming right now
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: 'The Long Walk,' a dystopian film adaptation of Stephen King's novel, is now available on HBO Max.
Ryan Gosling stars in 'Project Hail Mary,' streaming on Prime Video, about a science teacher in deep space.
'Little House on the Prairie' adapts Laura Ingalls Wilder's classic tale, streaming on Netflix.
